title: T-012 — Cascade Chain 3: Recipe_Components → Ingredient_Codes + sync_prod_detail_rows (NPD-a.3)
prompt:
# T-012 — Cascade Chain 3 (Recipe_Components sync)

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §6.1 Chain 3
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
On fa.recipe_components change, parse comma-separated codes, generate fa.ingredient_codes, and idempotently sync prod_detail rows (delete missing, create new, keep matches).

## Implementation contract
New packages/cascade-engine/src/chain3-recipe.ts. parseRecipeComponents splits comma-sep, trims. Generate ingredient_codes via Reference.CodePrefixes['ingredient'].prefix + extract_digits. syncProdDetailRows runs in tx: SELECT current rows, compute add/remove sets keyed by intermediate_code, perform deletes + inserts, preserve unchanged rows. Emit fa.recipe_changed event with diff. Multi-component sync target <500 ms for ≤10 components.

## Files
- packages/cascade-engine/src/chain3-recipe.ts [create]
- packages/cascade-engine/__tests__/chain3.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given fa.recipe_components changes from 'PR123H' to 'PR123H, PR456A', when handler runs, then prod_detail has 2 rows, ingredient_codes='RM123, RM456'
2. Given idempotent re-run of same value, when handler runs twice, then prod_detail row count remains 2 and no new rows are inserted
3. Given sync of 10 components, when measured over 1000 runs, then p95 <500 ms

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests for parsing+sync, idempotency, perf benchmark
- Run 'pnpm --filter cascade-engine test chain3'

## Risk red lines
- Do not delete rows whose intermediate_code still appears in new list
- Do not bypass RLS
- Do not call without DB tx

pipeline_inputs.description: Recipe_Components cascade auto-builds ingredient_codes and idempotently syncs prod_detail rows.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parse comma-sep, derive ingredient_codes, run set diff against existing prod_detail rows, delete absent, insert missing, keep matches. Emit fa.recipe_changed.
out_of_scope: Do not implement allergen cascade here (T-038)

Given idempotent re-run of same value, when handler runs twice, then prod_detail row count remains 2
Given sync of 10 components, when measured over 1000 runs, then p95 <500 ms
